title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
